verifier_rubric: per-paper joint coverage of all K=4 candidate sub-mechanisms
rationale: Kalman Linear Attention (arXiv 2602.10743, Feb 2026) jointly covers all four sub-mechanisms with full match: posterior Gaussian belief state, per-token Kalman update in information form, precision recursion, and uncertainty-derived (precision-ratio) gating. The KCSC proposal is the same mechanism repositioned as KV-cache. Verifier AGREES with primary FAIL — no Pattern E disagreement on this round.
